calendar.matters:
Valerie Fowler'S Verified Petition For Orders: (1) Suspension And Removal Of Janelle Green As Co-Trustee; (2) Appointment Of Kim Coleman, Pfac, As Successor Trustee;
(3) Requiring Respondent To Provide An Accounting In Accordance With Probate Code 1060 Et Seq.; (4) Compelling The Return Of Property Wrongfully Taken, Recovery Of Compensatory Damages And Double Damages Pursuant To Probate Code 850-859;
(5) Requiring Respondent To Hold Settlor'S Property In A
Constructive Trust For The Benefit

Valerie Fowler'S Verified Petition For Orders: (1) Suspension And Removal Of Janelle Green As Co-Trustee; (2) Appointment Of Kim Coleman, Pfac, As Successor Trustee;
(3) Requiring Respondent To Provide An Accounting In Accordance With Probate Code 1060 Et Seq.; (4) Compelling The Return Of Property Wrongfully Taken, Recovery Of Compensatory Damages And Double Damages Pursuant To Probate Code 850-859;
(5) Requiring Respondent To Hold Settlor'S Property In A
Constructive Trust For The Benefit
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Continued To Jul-20-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott Jordan, for and with Valeria Fowler, via Zoom videoconference, Petitioner.
Adilene Hurd, specially appearing for Endy Ukoha-Ajike, for Kim Coleman, interested party.
Janelle Green, in court, in propria persona, Objector/Petitioner.
Rittinelle Banks, in court, in propria persona, Trustee/Beneficiary.

At the outset, the court and the parties discuss the status of an accounting. There is discussion regarding the timing of the accounting. There is an agreement for the co-Trustees to provide an accounting from the date of the father's death to the present. The court reminds Ms. Green to verify her response and to Ms. Fowler and her counsel to re-send their notice with the appropriate box marked for Probate Code Sec. 859 relief.

The matter is continued to Jul-20-2026 as discussed and stipulated in open court. The court orders co-Trustees Janelle Green and Rittinelle Banks to produce the accounting by the next calling.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Petrucci. Not Reported.
